name: Meatloaf with Rice Stuffing (Microwave)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine ground beef, bread crumbs, tomato sauce, onion, celery, eggs, and seasonings in a large bowl; mix well.
2. Pat the mixture into a microwave bundt pan, pressing it against the sides and center tube of the pan to make a well for filling.
3. Layer mushrooms, cheese, rice, and sausage in the center of the meatloaf.
4. Press edges of the meat mixture over the filling, sealing completely to cover.
5. To freeze: Cover the pan with aluminum foil and seal it in a jumbo freezer bag.
6. To prepare: Thaw the meatloaf completely before cooking.
7. Cook on High in the microwave for 10 minutes.
8. Turn the meatloaf out of the bundt pan onto a microwave-safe rack.
9. Cook on High for 7-10 minutes, or until the interior temperature measures 135 degrees Fahrenheit.
10. Cover with aluminum foil and allow to stand for 10 minutes before serving.
Serving Ideas: Steamed Broccoli or Cauliflower, Fresh Wheat Bread
